'''âd-g-t-y''' ('''kadagteyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waiter|waiter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-g-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waiter|waiter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-g-t-y
|-
! Lemma
| kadagteyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidagteyoko|thidagteyoko]] || [[word:jidagteyoko|jidagteyoko]] || [[word:shidagteyoko|shidagteyoko]] || [[word:kidagteyoko|kidagteyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudagteyoko|thuthudagteyoko]] || [[word:jujudagteyoko|jujudagteyoko]] || [[word:shushudagteyoko|shushudagteyoko]] || [[word:kukudagteyoko|kukudagteyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodagteyoko|thodagteyoko]] || [[word:jodagteyoko|jodagteyoko]] || [[word:shodagteyoko|shodagteyoko]] || [[word:kodagteyoko|kodagteyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdagteyoko|thĂŠdagteyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdagteyoko|jĂŠdagteyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdagteyoko|shĂŠdagteyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdagteyoko|kĂŠdagteyoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadagteyoko|thadagteyoko]] || [[word:jadagteyoko|jadagteyoko]] || [[word:shadagteyoko|shadagteyoko]] || [[word:kadagteyoko|kadagteyoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
